THE BETTER WAY

pages.raw_text:
The police force is for the prevention Of crime the cap


i1ng of criminals and those who make their living by
CRIMINAL practices and not for the purpose Of causing the
weak the thoughess and unwse, and their innocent rea
lives to suffer and be disgraced Get away from the old
idea that the police simply brues and prosecute
people


So remarks Chief Fred Koher of Cleveland Ohio to his
captains sergeants and parolmen ... -..
/ And what was the result? ... ....


He chopped the number Of arrests and the expense to
the city of the municipal court and adjacent departments
in half in year.


that If policeman enough of man to be on the force
he is enough of to take prisoner without beating
him over the head and they likewise figure that if the
policemen have clubs there will be fewer senseess at
tacks helpless citizens and brains used by patrol
men in handling And so far the Golden Rule scheme
has worked wonderfully well in big tough city.
But in Spokane, with real criminal element with
brutal gangs with rough dives the police go forth to
slaughter. 1t is hammer and whang and smash. Chief
Sullivan acting the good old policy that the chief of
police runs the town. not only sees nothing but brute
force but he by Russian methods has scared the average
Ignorant man, who is wholly harmless and helpless into
thinking that he dare lift his voice in protest it is the
dark cell for him.


IN SPOKANE TODAY INTELLIGENT BUSINESS
MEN AND SCARED WOMEN WILL TELL YOU THAT
IF YOU CRITICISE CHIEF SULLIVAN OR HIS SYS-
TEN YOU WILL BE THROWN INTO JAIL ON
TRUMPED UP CONSPIRACY" CHARGE, AND AND
THUGS ON THE job


Compare that sort of system with that of the wsest
chief in the United States and ponder bit; .


What do you suppose Chief Kohler would say If the
women of Cleveland asked for police marons? Would he
call them liars and threaten them with libel SUITS We
1wonder yes, wonder


Getting down to bedrock fact and letting Cleveland
Chief Sullivan and his men don't protect the town from


thugs and thieves and they do harass and vex and
make ashamed decent folks who cant help themselves
Chief Sullivan may be but the political figurehead OF
Mayor Pratt; that matters little. He is weak despite all
his buffng and loud talk he surrounds himself with pot
ica incompeents; he has gmmer Of real police meth
DDS; he couldn't catch thief asleep he can't see
gambling game when chips the table before his eyes
and he makes honest men writhe at the disgrace he
thrusts the by his fool methods while he makes
-crooks laugh at his rural incompetence. .--<'.


The next time that the mayor puts man on the Job
who is not political braggart man who
can catch crooks and who doesn't beat the helpless
who lives for something besides gang politics, and man
who has some elemental sense of chivalry.
